mnemonics.title: Dictionary
mnemonics.content: D - Data, I - In, C - Collection, T - Tuples, I - Items, O - Of, N - Name, A - And, R - Return, Y - You

acronyms.usage: OOP is a programming paradigm that uses objects and classes to create reusable code.

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a dictionary as a collection of key-value pairs, where each key is unique and maps to a specific value.

analogies.analogy: A dictionary is like a phonebook, where each name (key) is associated with a phone number (value).
